characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion, short wavy dark brown hair, and brown eyes. Rendered in an anime/illustration style.
characters.wardrobe: Chunky cream-colored turtleneck sweater and small gold hoop earrings.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे perfect English नहीं बोलनी [I don't need to speak perfect English]
Character A says: मुझे बस confidence के साथ बात करनी है [I just want to speak with confidence]
Character A says: लेकिन सालों तक [But for years]
Character A says: मैं English बोलने से डरती थी, कि कहीं कोई गलती ना हो जाए [I was scared to speak English, fearing I might make a mistake]
Character A says: समझ तो सब आता था [I understood everything]
Character A says: Netflix, podcasts, songs... no problem [Netflix, podcasts, songs... no problem]
Character A says: लेकिन बोलते वक़्त दिमाग blank हो जाता था [But while speaking, my mind would go blank]
Character A says: क्योंकि हम subtitles पढ़कर अपनी आँखों को train कर रहे हैं, मुँह को नहीं [Because we are training our eyes by reading subtitles, not our mouth]
Character A says: इसीलिए हमारी spoken English अटक जाती है [That's why our spoken English gets stuck]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova try किया [Then I tried Supernova]
Character A says: यहाँ आप AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice कर सकते हैं [Here you can practice daily with an AI tutor]
Character A says: Interview हो, customer से बात करनी हो, या दोस्तों से [Whether it's an interview, talking to a customer, or friends]
Character A says: No books, no pressure. बस real-world speaking practice [No books, no pressure. Just real-world speaking practice]
Character A says: तो आँखों को नहीं, अपने मुँह को train करना शुरू करो [So start training your mouth, not your eyes]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करो और confidence के साथ English बोलो [Download Supernova today and speak English with confidence]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable desire for confidence over perfection.
- Highlights the common problem of understanding English but freezing when speaking.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor and real-world practice as the practical solution.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging CTA.

- Displays the Supernova brand logo and tagline.
- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
